name: Argo Check Cashing Corporation
description_short: Argo Check Cashing Corporation offers check cashing and financial services at a single Brooklyn location. Open weekdays 8am-6pm with phone support available.
description_long: Argo Check Cashing Corporation is a check-cashing service located in Brooklyn, New York, operating from 581 Clinton Street in the 11231 zip code. The company provides essential financial services to consumers who need quick access to funds from checks without maintaining traditional bank accounts or who prefer alternative financial services. Based on available information, Argo operates as a straightforward check-cashing establishment serving the local Brooklyn community. The business maintains regular weekday hours from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday through Friday, with phone support available at (718) 596-0952 for customer inquiries. Argo Check Cashing Corporation distinguishes itself as a neighborhood-based service provider in a densely populated urban area where check-cashing services remain relevant for unbanked and underbanked populations. The Clinton Street location in Brooklyn's waterfront area positions it to serve residents and workers in the surrounding community. Unlike large national chains, Argo appears to operate as a localized service with direct phone contact available to customers. The company's consistent weekday operating hours suggest a focus on serving working individuals who need reliable access during standard business days. Without additional detailed information about specific fee structures, service offerings beyond check cashing, or customer reviews, assessment is limited to basic operational facts. The absence of Saturday hours may be a limitation for weekend workers or those with inflexible schedules. As with most check-cashing services, consumers should verify current fee structures and compare rates before using the service, as check-cashing fees can vary significantly.
pros: Consistent weekday operating hours (8am-6pm) Monday through Friday for accessibility
Direct phone contact available at (718) 596-0952 for customer service
Established physical location in Brooklyn providing in-person service
Convenient Clinton Street location in accessible Brooklyn neighborhood
Serves unbanked and underbanked consumers who need check-cashing services
cons: No Saturday or Sunday hours limits accessibility for weekend workers
Single location in Brooklyn only—not a multi-branch operation
No website with service details, fee information, or online offerings visible
Limited information available about specific services offered beyond check cashing
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked Brooklyn residents without bank accounts
Workers needing weekday check cashing during standard business hours
Local neighborhood customers preferring in-person financial services
Consumers seeking alternative to traditional banking institutions
diagnosis: Argo Check Cashing Corporation is best for Brooklyn residents and workers who need quick, in-person check cashing during weekday business hours and prefer alternative financial services over traditional banking. Primary caveat: no weekend hours and limited information about specific fees and service offerings—verify rates before using.
services: Local check cashing for personal checks
